title: Update README with Author Information
description: Add the author's name and relevant details to the project's README file as per standard open source conventions.
details: Open the README.md file at the root of the project. Insert an 'Author' section near the end (or in the appropriate place if a contributors/credits section exists). Add the author's name and, if applicable, contact information or links (such as GitHub profile or email). Ensure the formatting matches the rest of the README and adheres to markdown best practices.
test_strategy: Review the README.md file in the repository. Confirm that the 'Author' section is present, correctly formatted, and displays the intended information. Optionally, preview the markdown rendering to ensure visual correctness.
